use_cases: Creates immersive cosmic backgrounds for landing pages and hero sections
Adds dynamic space-themed animation effects to web experiences
Provides interactive starfield with mouse tracking for portfolio sites
Enables hyperspace warp transitions for gaming-inspired interfaces
Delivers ambient particle effects for media and entertainment websites
ai_summary: An interactive canvas-based starfield animation featuring 3D perspective star movement, configurable colors, and mouse-tracking parallax effects. Supports hyperspace warp transitions and click-to-warp interactions for creating immersive space-themed backgrounds in web applications.
